title: Comprehensive Agent
description: The final agent composes context assembly, tools, memory, teams, background work, cron, worktrees, and MCP.

steps.content: Plan a release: inspect tasks, run checks, delegate docs, and keep long scans in the background.
steps.annotation: The final lesson combines many earlier capabilities in one request.

steps.content: assemble_prompt: memory + task graph + skills + available tools + policy
steps.annotation: The runtime builds the prompt from layered sources of context.

steps.content: I'll inspect the task graph, delegate docs, start the slow scan in the background, and use the release checklist skill.
steps.annotation: The model chooses multiple mechanisms while keeping one coherent plan.
Skills contribute procedural context before execution.
Team delegation handles a parallel slice of the release.

steps.content: npm run lint && npm run test
steps.annotation: Long-running validation goes through the background task path.
External capabilities are added only when needed.

steps.content: recover: background task done, teammate replied, MCP deploy status ready
steps.annotation: The integrated runtime folds asynchronous results back into the loop.

steps.content: Release preparation is ready: checks passed, docs are updated in the teammate worktree, and deployment status is available.
steps.annotation: The comprehensive agent returns a single user-facing outcome.
